---
title: "Home"
---

# 👋 Zhuolun Wu

🎓 Boston University – Business Analytics  
📍 Boston, MA  
📧 zb082101@gmail.com  

---

## 🚀 About Me

I am a data-driven business analyst with a strong background in data analytics, machine learning, and business strategy. I specialize in transforming complex datasets into actionable insights to support decision-making.

---

## 💡 Core Skills

- Python (Pandas, NumPy)
- SQL & Data Engineering
- Tableau / Power BI (Dashboarding)
- R (Statistical Modeling)
- Machine Learning (Regression, Clustering)

---

## 📊 What I Do

- Build data pipelines and dashboards  
- Perform statistical and predictive analysis  
- Support business strategy with data insights  

---

## 📸 Project Snapshot

![](images/f7646e62d0fa48af9239b86dcbc6af48.jpeg){width=70%}
